attributes.Community_Name: Military Loan Originators (VA Loan Experts) Community
attributes.Description: Designed to inform and educate military and veteran homebuyers seeking to engage loan originators who are also former military. The MustWants app connects military home buyers with real estate and mortgage specialists, including military loan originators and VA loan experts. These specialists help military members and veterans navigate the home buying process and save money along the way.

attributes.Description: Welcome to the MustWants community! As a distinguished group of real estate professionals, you're now part of a network committed to transforming the home buying experience for Military Families. Invite your friends, create a new post, and visit MustWants.com to learn more about us!
attributes.New_Member_Intro:
Welcome to a supportive Military Real Estate Professionals Community. Designed by and for those who understand the unique challenges of military relocations, our group brings together real estate professionals, military families, and industry experts in one dynamic forum. As seasoned military movers looking to better serve this community, MustWants is building the eco-system and tools to streamline the home search, moving process. Benefit from shared experiences, insights, and the collective wisdom of those who've been in their shoes. Join us to network and ensure your referrals make sense with experienced Military Real Estate Professionals. Powered by MustWants.com 
- The admin team
